full_text:
Guan Hai 管亥
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guan Hai (管亥). Former member of the Yellow Scarves. Besiged Beihai and was killed by Guan Yu. Guan Hai was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Guan Hai lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
